title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese outlines a 4-pillar system for how Alex Hormozi uses AI in his businesses: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. Marchese identifies a critical error Hormozi's teams were making that required organizational correction.
